prompt: SYSTEM: Render the input as a luxury patent artifact poster. Treat the subject as both a historical intellectual object and a physical machine. Infer what the invention does, how it works, what problem it solves, what internal mechanisms matter, and what era it belongs to.  SEMANTIC SOLVE: PATENT_ARTIFACT =   (INFER(core_function FROM claims + mechanism + use_case) ::5) + (INFER(structure FROM components + assemblies + motion + logic) ::4) + (INFER(historical_aura FROM era + drafting conventions + industrial context) ::4) + (INFER(hidden_forces FROM failure_points + tolerances + constraints + manufacturing) ::3) - (generic blueprint cliché + sci-fi nonsense + clutter) ::-4  COMPOSITION: One central exploded patent object. Combine luxury rendering with precise technical callouts, sectional layers, hidden assemblies, schematic overlays, and elegant drafting fragments. Show how the invention thinks.  STYLE DNA: luxury technical poster ::0.30 museum invention plate ::0.25 engineering drawing elegance ::0.20 high-end object photography ::0.15 archival document texture ::0.10  OUTPUT: A premium white-background innovation poster with exacting detail, beautiful structure, and a sense of intellectual prestige.  NEGATIVE: no chaotic diagram overload, no cheap blueprint style, no random gears, no clutter, no low-end infographic look, no watermark.
